data.keyword: Who offers family therapy and care coordination in Louisville?
data.tag: lmhg ai mode expanded Who offers family therapy and care coordination in Louisville?

result.keyword: Who offers family therapy and care coordination in Louisville?

items.markdown:
Several providers in Louisville offer family therapy and care coordination (case management) to support families with behavioral and emotional needs.[[1]](https://fccwellbeing.com/clinic-locations/colorado/louisville-clinic/)

**Top Providers for Family Therapy and Care Coordination in Louisville:** 

- **[Haven Family Counseling](https://boysandgirlshaven.org/programs/haven-family-counseling/)** (part of Boys & Girls Haven) offers intensive in-home therapy, outpatient office counseling, and case management for families.
- **[Creative Family Counseling](https://creativefamilycounseling.org/)** specializes in child, teen, and family counseling services in the Louisville area.
- **[LifeStance Health](https://lifestance.com/services/family-therapy/ky/louisville/)** has multiple locations in Louisville (Executive Park and Eastpoint Parkway) providing family therapy.
- **Jim Walker, LCSW** (Brownsboro Park Blvd) provides in-office or telehealth family/couples psychotherapy.[](https://creativefamilycounseling.org/) [[1]](https://creativefamilycounseling.org/)[[2]](https://boysandgirlshaven.org/programs/haven-family-counseling/)[[3]](https://lifestance.com/services/family-therapy/ky/louisville/)[[4]](https://jimwalker.fullslate.com/services/6)

**Key Services & Support:** 

- **Intensive In-Home Therapy:** Available for families needing more focused care.
- **Case Management:** Coordinated care planning to address complex needs.
- **Telehealth Options:** Available for convenient, remote sessions.[](https://boysandgirlshaven.org/programs/haven-family-counseling/) [[1]](https://boysandgirlshaven.org/programs/haven-family-counseling/)[[2]](https://jimwalker.fullslate.com/services/6)[[3]](https://whiteglovehomecare.com/best-pediatric-case-management-agencies-in-new-york/)

Would you like to explore **specific areas of specialization** (e.g., trauma-informed, addiction) or find providers that **accept a particular insurance**?
